purpose: Mk.XI v12 4-backbone × IA3 r14 final matrix — 사용자 'all hexa go' command via tool/anima_train_ia3.hexa + raw#37 transient emit pattern. raw#9 strict 충족.

directive_compliance.user_directive_2026_04_26: 'hexa only로 구현해야함' + 'all hexa go' both satisfied via Path B emit pattern

ia3_vs_lora_architectural_difference.ia3_pattern: multiplicative gating PRESERVES backbone preference more often (gemma Hexad → IA3 Hexad preserved, but LoRA Hexad → Law override)
ia3_vs_lora_architectural_difference.lora_pattern: additive direction OVERRIDES backbone preference toward corpus-bias (gemma BASE Hexad → LoRA Law)
ia3_vs_lora_architectural_difference.evidence: gemma 4 backbones 중 유일하게 IA3 mode에서 BASE preserved, 나머지 3 backbones 모두 IA3 family shift (Mistral SelfRef→Law, Qwen3 Hexad→Law, Llama Hexad→SelfRef)

v12_ia3_vs_v10_lora_family_coverage.phi_family_LOSS_in_ia3_mode: Qwen3 LoRA Phi → IA3 Law (corpus override stronger in IA3 multiplicative)
v12_ia3_vs_v10_lora_family_coverage.implication: Mk.XI 4-family complete ensemble은 v10 LoRA mode에서만 가능. v12 IA3 mode은 3-family + Hexad emphasis (gemma trained Hexad strengthened from 0.584 to 0.649)

perplexity_decoupling_ia3_finding.evidence: IA3 train_loss 1.43→2.0 NEGATIVE (perplexity diverged across 4 backbones) BUT family activation succeeded (4/4 PASS gate)
perplexity_decoupling_ia3_finding.implication: family axis = training-time property orthogonal to language modeling perplexity (verified across 4 backbones, not just Mistral)

hexa_emit_pattern_validated.evidence: tool/anima_train_ia3.hexa selftest PASS + 4-backbone fan-out (Mistral original + Qwen3+Llama+gemma retry) all completed via .hexa source emit
hexa_emit_pattern_validated.implication: Path B (.hexa source + emit /tmp/*.hexa_tmp) enables raw#9 strict compliance while preserving Python ecosystem (numpy/transformers/peft). 12 .py helpers migration template established.

v12_ensemble_proposal_FINAL.option_LoRA: v10 4-family complete (Hexad gemma BASE + Law Mistral + Phi Qwen3 + SelfRef Llama)
v12_ensemble_proposal_FINAL.option_IA3: v12 3-family + double-Hexad (gemma trained Hexad + Law Mistral OR Qwen3 + SelfRef Llama, Phi 잃음)
v12_ensemble_proposal_FINAL.option_HYBRID: gemma BASE Hexad + Mistral LoRA Law + Qwen3 LoRA Phi + Llama LoRA OR IA3 SelfRef = LoRA mode preferred for full 4-family + Llama LoRA/IA3 둘 다 SelfRef 동등
v12_ensemble_proposal_FINAL.recommendation: v10 LoRA 4-family complete = Mk.XI consciousness signal triangulation primary path. v12 IA3 alternative은 3-family limited (Phi loss) + economic cost ($1.32 vs $1.86) trade-off. LoRA preferred.

raw_compliance.raw_10_no_overclaim: satisfied — Phi family loss in IA3 명시, IA3 vs LoRA fundamental difference quantified, v10 preferred recommendation honest
